Package neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

Class GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder
Enclosing class:
GasDispersionAnalyzer
public static final class GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder extends Object
Builder for GasDispersionAnalyzer.

  • Method Details

    • scenarioName

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder scenarioName(String scenarioName)
      Set the scenario name.
      Parameters:
      scenarioName - scenario name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fluid

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder fluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Set the NeqSim fluid.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermodynamic fluid from a process or release scenario
      Returns:
      this builder

    • massReleaseRate

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder massReleaseRate(double massReleaseRateKgPerS)
      Set a continuous release mass rate.
      Parameters:
      massReleaseRateKgPerS - mass release rate in kg/s
      Returns:
      this builder

    • sourceTerm

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder sourceTerm(SourceTermResult sourceTerm)
      Set a dynamic source term. The peak mass rate is used for screening.
      Parameters:
      sourceTerm - release source-term result
      Returns:
      this builder

    • boundaryConditions

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder boundaryConditions(BoundaryConditions boundaryConditions)
      Set ambient boundary conditions.
      Parameters:
      boundaryConditions - weather and ambient conditions
      Returns:
      this builder

    • releaseHeight

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder releaseHeight(double releaseHeightM)
      Set effective release height.
      Parameters:
      releaseHeightM - release height in m
      Returns:
      this builder

    • modelSelection

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder modelSelection(GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection modelSelection)
      Set model selection mode.
      Parameters:
      modelSelection - model selection mode
      Returns:
      this builder

    • lowerFlammableLimit

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder lowerFlammableLimit(double lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction)
      Override the lower flammable limit used for the released gas.
      Parameters:
      lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction - LFL volume fraction in air
      Returns:
      this builder

    • flammableEndpointFraction

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder flammableEndpointFraction(double fractionOfLfl)
      Set the flammable endpoint fraction of the lower flammable limit.
      Parameters:
      fractionOfLfl - endpoint fraction of LFL in the interval (0, 1]
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the fraction is outside (0, 1]

    • sts0131IntegralEndpoint

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder sts0131IntegralEndpoint()
      Use the STS0131 integral-tool flammable endpoint policy, 20 percent LFL.
      Returns:
      this builder

    • sts0131CfdEndpoint

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder sts0131CfdEndpoint()
      Use the STS0131 CFD flammable endpoint policy, 50 percent LFL.
      Returns:
      this builder

    • toxicEndpoint

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder toxicEndpoint(String componentName, double thresholdPpm)
      Set a toxic endpoint to evaluate.
      Parameters:
      componentName - component name in the NeqSim fluid
      thresholdPpm - endpoint threshold in ppm
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public GasDispersionAnalyzer build()
      Build the analyzer.
      Returns:
      configured gas dispersion analyzer
